goal: Review pull requests with three independent checkers and aggregate feedback
user_persona: senior backend engineer opening or reviewing PRs

sub_tasks.description: Look for SQL injection, XSS, leaked secrets, insecure auth patterns in the diff
Spot N+1 queries, unnecessary loops, allocation hotspots in the diff
Verify each changed module has a test touching the new behaviour

autonomy_limits: must never push or merge without confirmation

success_criteria: Each checker produces a structured finding list
Orchestrator aggregates findings into a single PR comment
No false positives on a golden-set of 10 PRs
